articles.author: Omar Sohail
articles.title: Apple Could Unveil Its Sub-1nm Chips In A Few Years, As TSMC Said To Fire Up Trial Production In 2029 - Wccftech
articles.description: A report states that TSMC is planning to begin trial production of its sub-1nm process in 2029, giving Apple an opportunity to unveil a technological marvel
articles.content: The first wave of 2nm chipsets is scheduled to arrive later this year, with Apple introducing its A20 and A20 Pro range for its iPhone 18 family, but theres little time for taking breaks, especially … [+2171 chars]
